# Known-broken doc links accepted by scripts/check_doc_freshness.py.
#
# Each line is a target string (the path inside `[text](path)` or
# `<img src="path">`) that we will NOT flag. Add a comment above
# each batch explaining the reason — review on the next clean-up
# sweep.
#
# Format: one path per line. Comments start with `#`. Blank lines
# are ignored.

# --- Round-18 archive: links into ../docs/ that no longer exist
#     because the archive predates the docs reorg. Frozen by design;
#     the round itself is closed. Re-evaluate before referencing the
#     archive in any live doc.
../docs/verification/round18_ext_2026_05_13/manifest.md
../docs/verification/round18_ext_2026_05_13/SUMMARY.md

# --- docs/design/Design_System.md: screenshots that have not yet
#     been captured. The design system doc is a living spec; once
#     the screenshots exist the entries below must be removed.
./screenshots/primitives_overview.png
./screenshots/pill.png
./screenshots/card.png
./screenshots/panel.png
